passage: Ruth woke up early and made breakfast. She had toast with jam and a cup of coffee. Then she read the newspaper.

questions.q: What did Ruth have on her toast?
What did she do after breakfast?

passage: George went out to the garden after lunch. He pulled a few weeds and watered the roses. The roses were bright red.
The mail came at noon. There was a letter from Helen's sister and a postcard from the beach. Helen read the letter first.
Frank fixed a sandwich for lunch. He sat on the back porch to eat it. A gray cat watched him from the steps.

questions.q: Where did Frank sit to eat?

passage: It was a sunny Saturday. Edith hung the wash out on the line to dry. By afternoon the sheets smelled fresh and warm.

questions.q: Where did Edith hang the wash?
